description: Configures top-level Okta Identity Governance policies for access requests and certifications. Creates the governance policy framework that other modules (access-requests, certifications, approval-workflows) attach to. Controls default actions for request handling and certification failure remediation.
terraform_support_notes: Uses okta_policy with ACCESS_POLICY type as the closest available resource. Full OIG-specific governance policy resources (okta_governance_policy) require Okta API v2024.06+ and are not yet in the Terraform provider. Policy shell is created; OIG-specific rule properties require manual configuration or API calls.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Request policy: require_approval. Certification failure action: notify (flag for review, no auto-remediation).
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Request policy: require_approval. Certification failure action: flag (requires manual review and action).
risk_profile_effects.strict: Request policy: require_approval. Certification failure action: revoke (automatic access removal on cert failure).

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your governance security tier. Controls how aggressively the system responds to access request decisions and certification failures.

enable_request_policy.label: Enable Access Request Policy
enable_request_policy.client_description: Create the governance policy that controls access request workflows. Should be enabled for any organization using OIG Access Requests.

enable_certification_policy.label: Enable Certification Policy
enable_certification_policy.client_description: Create the governance policy that controls access certification behavior. Should be enabled for any organization running certification campaigns.

request_policy_action.label: Request Policy Action
request_policy_action.client_description: Default action for access requests. 'allow' grants immediately without approval (not recommended). 'require_approval' routes to the approval workflow. 'deny' blocks all self-service requests (admin-only provisioning).

certification_policy_action.label: Certification Failure Action
certification_policy_action.client_description: What happens when access is not certified (reviewer denies or campaign expires). 'notify' sends an alert but takes no action. 'flag' marks for manual review. 'revoke' automatically removes the access — use this for strict compliance environments (SOX, HIPAA, FedRAMP).

outputs.request_policy_id: Access request governance policy ID. Null if disabled.
outputs.certification_policy_id: Certification governance policy ID. Null if disabled.
outputs.effective_request_policy_action: The resolved request policy action after applying risk profile defaults and overrides.
outputs.effective_certification_policy_action: The resolved certification failure action after applying risk profile defaults and overrides.
